findings.title: External CDN stylesheet is render-blocking with no fallback
findings.expected: Self-host or use non-blocking strategy with local CSS fallback

findings.title: External CDN script is render-blocking (no defer/async)
findings.expected: Add defer or self-host the asset

findings.title: JSON.stringify called 6x in useCallback dependency array on every render
findings.expected: Single useMemo computing a stable key, or stabilize array refs at call site

findings.title: resolveThemeColor (getComputedStyle) called during render in GraphView
findings.current: const labelColor = resolveThemeColor(...) called on every render
findings.expected: Wrap in useMemo or remove — ThemeObserver handles this reactively

findings.title: graph.forEachNode for visibleCategories not memoized — runs every render
findings.current: Computed inline in render body, re-runs on every filter/hover state change

findings.title: Fuse.js statically imported — adds to eager bundle even when search never opened
findings.current: import Fuse from 'fuse.js'; — static top-level import
findings.expected: Lazy-load inside useMemo/useEffect when search opens, like ForceAtlas2 pattern

findings.title: Fuse index rebuilt every time search panel opens (open in dep array)
findings.current: useMemo(() => { ... }, [sigma, open]) — open causes full rebuild
findings.expected: Depend on [sigma] only — graph doesn't change while search is open
